title: Namefi Feed

list.emptyFiltered: No matching listings in this part of the feed.

card.sellerPlatformDomainCount: {count, plural, one {# domain on {platform}} other {# domains on {platform}}}
card.sellerDomainCountTooltip: {count, plural, one {# domain from this seller} other {# domains from this seller}}

report.dialogDescription: Flag issues with <highlight>{domain}</highlight>. Our team reviews reports before taking action.
report.detailsPlaceholder: Add context that will help us verify the issue.
report.detailsHelp: Optional notes to support your report.
report.submitErrorFallback: Unable to submit report. Please try again.

alreadySold.label: Already sold
alreadySold.description: The domain has already sold and should not stay in the feed.

inaccuratePrice.label: Inaccurate price
inaccuratePrice.description: The listed asking price appears wrong or misleading.

notForSale.label: Not for sale
notForSale.description: The post does not represent a real domain sale listing.

duplicateListing.label: Duplicate listing
duplicateListing.description: This sale was already listed elsewhere in the feed.

other.label: Other
other.description: Use details to describe the issue clearly.

handle.invalidPath: This feed user path is not valid.
handle.emptyListings: No listings found for this seller.

subtitle.noDomains: No domains listed by this seller yet.
subtitle.feedAndNamefi: {feedCount, plural, one {# feed domain} other {# feed domains}} and {namefiCount, plural, one {# Namefi-owned domain} other {# Namefi-owned domains}}.
subtitle.feedOnly: {feedCount, plural, one {# feed domain} other {# feed domains}} listed by this seller.

users.title: Users
users.loadingSubtitle: Loading users who post domain sale listings.
users.subtitle: {count, plural, one {# matching user} other {# matching users}}.
users.subtitleRefreshed: {count, plural, one {# matching user} other {# matching users}}, refreshed {refreshedAt}.
users.searchPlaceholder: Search handle, domain, or post text

domainSubtitle: Public sale posts for {domain} indexed by Namefi, with seller handles and source links.
domainEmptyDescription: {domain} isn't in the Namefi feed yet.
domainErrorDescription: Something went wrong. Please try again.
